name: Megan Stalter
bio: Megan Stalter is an American comedian, actress, and singer who built a following through character-driven sketch videos online before breaking out as Kayla on the HBO Max series Hacks. She later starred in Lena Dunhams Too Much.

timeline.ev: Rises in New Yorks alt-comedy scene and goes viral with Hi Gay
Begins playing Kayla on HBO Maxs Hacks
Stars as Jessica in Lena Dunhams Too Much
Releases debut single Prettiest Girl In America

accolades: New York magazine comedians you should and will know (2019)
Breakout role as Kayla on Hacks
Lead role in Lena Dunhams Too Much
